_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: DCTS_OLD
author: marcel@dcts.community
description: DCTS - self-hosted Discord/TeamSpeak-style chat platform with E2E encrypted DMs and decentralized server discovery.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
export HOME=/mnt/server
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

git config --global --add safe.directory /mnt/server

if [ ! -d ".git" ]; then
  echo "Cloning from github..."
  git clone -b beta https://github.com/hackthedev/dcts-shipping.git .
else
  echo "Updating existing installation..."
  git fetch origin beta
  git reset --hard origin/beta
fi

echo -e "Preparing directories and fixing permissions..."
mkdir -p sv configs public/uploads public/emojis plugins themes livekit

echo "Fetching latest LiveKit release..."
LATEST_VERSION=$(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/livekit/livekit/releases/latest | grep '"tag_name":' | head -n 1 | sed -E 's/.*"v([^"]+)".*/\1/')
echo "Installing LiveKit v${LATEST_VERSION}..."
curl -sL "https://github.com/livekit/livekit/releases/latest/download/livekit_${LATEST_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz" -o livekit_linux_amd64.tar.gz
tar -xzf livekit_linux_amd64.tar.gz livekit-server
mv livekit-server livekit/livekit-server
rm livekit_linux_amd64.tar.gz
chmod +x livekit/livekit-server

echo -e "Installation completed.\nDependencies will be installed on first start."

variables.name: Server Port
variables.description: Main HTTP port for the DCTS web interface.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Display name of the DCTS server.

variables.name: Database Host
variables.description: MariaDB host. Use Docker gateway IP (usually 172.18.0.1) for host DB.

variables.name: Redis Host
variables.description: Redis host. Use Docker gateway IP for host Redis.

variables.name: LiveKit API Port (HTTP)
variables.description: Port used for internal LiveKit signaling.

variables.name: LiveKit RTC TCP Port
variables.description: Secondary port used for LiveKit TCP WebRTC signaling.

variables.name: LiveKit RTC UDP Port
variables.description: Port used for direct LiveKit UDP WebRTC media streaming.
